info.title: Raindrop.io API
info.description: Raindrop.io is a bookmark manager that allows you to save, organize, and share web content. This API provides programmatic access to collections, bookmarks (raindrops), tags, user data, highlights, filters, imports, and backups.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Collection ID. Use -99 to empty trash.

400.description: Empty emails array or exceeds 10 limit

403.description: Too many pending invitations or insufficient permissions

post.summary: Accept an invitation to join a collection

403.description: Incorrect/expired token, collection not found, or user already owns collection

pleaseParse.description: Set to empty object to auto-parse metadata from the link

delete.description: Moves raindrop to Trash. If already in Trash, removes permanently.

400.description: No file provided, invalid format, or size limit exceeded

get.summary: Get permanent copy of a raindrop
get.description: Returns a redirect to the permanent copy. Requires PRO plan.

post.summary: Suggest collections and tags for a new bookmark URL

get.summary: Suggest collections and tags for an existing bookmark

get.description: Use collectionId 0 for all, -1 for Unsorted, -99 for Trash.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection ID. 0 for all, -1 for Unsorted, -99 for Trash.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection ID. Use -99 for permanent deletion from Trash.

get.description: When collectionId is 0, returns all tags from all collections.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection ID. Use 0 for all collections.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection ID. Use 0 for all collections.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection ID. Use 0 for all collections.

parameters.name: tagsSort
parameters.description: Sort tags by count or name

get.summary: Parse and extract info from any URL

post.summary: Check if URLs are already saved

post.description: Supports Netscape, Pocket, and Instapaper file formats.

get.description: Triggers backup generation. An email with the export file will be sent when ready.

bearerAuth.description: Use a test token or OAuth2 access token

password.description: Whether user has a password set
